form.formComment: Didn't do much at the last run, 5th (Fr1) over 1780m at this track beaten 20 m by Belmer Betty (2:11.00) in 4yo+ NR up to 40 on April 2 at $41. Before that 6th (Fr3) over 2040m at this track beaten 45 m by Vinnie Nitro (2:30.00) in 4yo+ NR up to 40 on March 26 at $101. Not keen on her chances in this line-up.

form.formComment: Didn't do much at the last run, 8th (Fr2) over 1660m at Albion Park, beaten 35 m by Rosies Boy (2:00.90) in Up to 3 LTW on March 30 at $34. Before that 4th (Fr1) over 1850m at Marburg beaten 30 m by Getagrip (2:16.30) in Up to 3 LTW on March 15 at $21. This looks tough.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up in the early stages before getting clear in the home straight.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into fourth behind Vinnie Nitro at this track over 2040m in a 4yo+ NR up to 40 on March 26 at $151. Then a handy effort when beaten by 2.75 m finishing second behind Belmer Betty at this track over 1780m in a 4yo+ NR up to 40 on April 2 at $3.20. Winning prospects.

form.formComment: Last start was well back in the run when 6th (Fr4) over 1780m after racing wide at this track beaten 15 m by Zeezeezoom (2:09.90) in Up to 3 LTW on April 1 at $151. At the start before 5th (Fr6) over 1780m at this track, beaten 22 m by Eternal Bliss (2:09.00) in Up to 3 LTW on March 25 at $81. Can be competitive if at her best.

form.formComment: Failed to impress last start; 5th (Fr1) over 1850m at Marburg beaten 14 m by Saturday Dance (2:16.80) in Up to 1 LTW on March 15 at $4.40. Showed ability the run before when she won by a head (Fr1) at this track (2:33.50) beating Captain Foxtrot in 4yo+ NR up to 40 on March 12 at $8. Contender.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into third behind Vinnie Nitro at this track over 2040m in a 4yo+ NR up to 40 on March 26 at $41. Then a handy effort when well beaten into third behind Belmer Betty at this track over 1780m in a 4yo+ NR up to 40 on April 2 at $23. Nearing a win.

form.formComment: Capable of better than we have seen lately. Last start 9th (Fr6) over 1780m at this track, beaten 35 m by Belmer Betty (2:11.00) in 4yo+ NR up to 40 on April 2 at $6.50. The start before was well back in the run when 7th (Fr6) over 2138m at Albion Park beaten 35 m by Matteo (2:34.70) in Up to 3 LTW on March 27 at $61. Expecting a much better run this time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Broke gait leaving the first turn.
Held up at a vital stage in the straight.
Worked forward three wide to take over the lead near the 1500m.
